name: 1shot1kill-dota2-mod
description: Dota 2 custom game alpha scaffold for One Shot One Kill.

scripts.build: npm run build:game && npm run build:panorama && npm run copy:assets
scripts.copy:assets: cp -r content/panorama/layout/* addon/content/panorama/layout/ && cp -r content/panorama/styles/* addon/content/panorama/styles/
